2026-03-25JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Court of King's Bench of ManitobaAppointment of Amiram Y. Kotler of the City of Winnipeg, in the Province of Manitoba, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Court of King's Bench of Manitoba.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Court of King's Bench of Manitoba
precis: Appointment of Amiram Y. Kotler of the City of Winnipeg, in the Province of Manitoba, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Court of King's Bench of Manitoba.
